education.faculty: School of Information Technology and Innovation (B.Sc. Computer Science).
education.description1: Studying at Bangkok University has been an incredible journey into the world of technology. My education focused on building a strong foundation in Software Engineering, Data Structures, and Algorithms, while also exploring cutting-edge fields like Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.
education.description2: Beyond the theory, the program emphasized hands-on innovation. I learned to transform complex problems into efficient digital solutions, working with technologies ranging from Web Development to Data Analytics.

intern.position: Data Engineer (Intern) · Business Data and Analytics
intern.metaDept: Data Engineer ( Team - Business Data & Analytic )
intern.aboutP1: Wisesight is Thailand's leading Social Media Analytics provider, offering a comprehensive platform to turn Big Data into actionable business Insights.
intern.aboutP2: The company operates with an Agile methodology, emphasizing teamwork and fast adaptability in a friendly, learning-focused culture.

clientSeg.name: Client Segmentation
clientSeg.desc: Segment clients using K-Means Clustering to develop targeted strategies.

comeback.name: Comeback Analysis
comeback.desc: Analyse reactivation probability of lapsed clients using RFM scoring.

tagAnalysis.name: Tag Analysis
tagAnalysis.desc: Build customer tags via Rule-Based Logic to surface behavioural patterns.

monteCarlo.name: Monte Carlo Simulation
monteCarlo.desc: Simulate quotation revenue using probabilistic sampling to estimate ranges.

dashboard.name: Dashboard Development
dashboard.desc: Develop real-time dashboards with Apache Superset.

roles: Data Preparation — Collect, validate, and organise data from multiple sources for every project.
Tag Analysis — Develop Rule-Based Tag conditions to classify client behaviour.
K-Means Clustering — Analyse and tune the clustering model (Newcomers, Regular, High-Potential, VIP).
Dremio Data Structuring — Manage data schemas on Dremio and build datasets for Superset.
Dashboard Design — Design and customise dashboards on Apache Superset for business users.

toolsDesc.superset: Build dashboards and data visualisations with real-time interactivity.
toolsDesc.dremio: Federate data from multiple sources and query with SQL — no new DB required.
toolsDesc.jupyter: Write Python code for data cleaning, analysis, and model building.
toolsDesc.pythonSql: Primary languages for data processing, modelling, and querying Dremio.

intern.quote: "The most memorable part was the people — approachable, warm, and always ready with genuine advice."

swot.s: Strong foundational knowledge of the tools and systems used, enabling fast learning and application.
swot.w: Presenting technical findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders is still an area for improvement.
swot.o: Gained hands-on experience across multiple real projects and explored new tools.
swot.t: Data management tasks such as calculations and deletions are highly sensitive; any mistake could affect overall results.

about.label: About the Role
about.title: Software
about.p1: I worked as a Software Developer at Anousith Logistics Co., Ltd. — Laos's leading logistics company — from July 2025 to April 2026. During this period, I was responsible for developing and maintaining internal systems to enhance the efficiency of the company's day-to-day logistics operations.
about.p2: My work focused on building scalable, user-friendly internal tools using modern technologies including React.js, Node.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript. These solutions helped streamline workflows across departments such as COD management, parcel tracking, and branch coordination nationwide.

items.name: Internal System Development
items.desc: Designed and developed internal web systems to streamline logistics operations and improve workflow efficiency across departments.

items.name: Frontend Development
items.desc: Built responsive and performant UIs using React.js and TypeScript, ensuring a seamless user experience for internal staff.

items.name: Backend Development
items.desc: Developed RESTful APIs and server-side logic with Node.js to support logistics data management and real-time operations.

items.name: Operations Optimization
items.desc: Analyzed existing workflows and implemented digital solutions to reduce manual tasks and increase operational throughput.

items.name: System Integration
items.desc: Connected internal tools with existing platforms (COD, tracking, branch systems) to create a unified data ecosystem.

react.name: React.js
react.desc: Built dynamic internal dashboards and admin panels with component-based architecture.

node.name: Node.js
node.desc: Developed backend APIs and server logic to power logistics data workflows.

javascript.name: JavaScript
javascript.desc: Core language used across frontend and backend for rapid, scalable development.

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.desc: Applied type safety to large codebases for fewer bugs and better maintainability.
